verses.text: Samson finds his wife given to another and seeks revenge. Wronged. He is provoked.
Samson finds his wife given to another and seeks revenge. Wronged. He is provoked.
Samson finds his wife given to another and seeks revenge. Wronged. He is provoked.
He burns the Philistines' corn with foxes and firebrands. Burned. He repays their wrong.
He burns the Philistines' corn with foxes and firebrands. Burned. He repays their wrong.
They burn his wife; he smites them and dwells in a rock. Avenged. Violence breeds violence.
They burn his wife; he smites them and dwells in a rock. Avenged. Violence breeds violence.
They burn his wife; he smites them and dwells in a rock. Avenged. Violence breeds violence.
Judah binds him to deliver him to the Philistines. Bound. His own people fear.
Judah binds him to deliver him to the Philistines. Bound. His own people fear.
Judah binds him to deliver him to the Philistines. Bound. His own people fear.
Judah binds him to deliver him to the Philistines. Bound. His own people fear.
Judah binds him to deliver him to the Philistines. Bound. His own people fear.
The cords break; he slays a thousand with a jawbone. Jawbone. God saves by a humble weapon.
The cords break; he slays a thousand with a jawbone. Jawbone. God saves by a humble weapon.
The cords break; he slays a thousand with a jawbone. Jawbone. God saves by a humble weapon.
The cords break; he slays a thousand with a jawbone. Jawbone. God saves by a humble weapon.
Thirsty, he prays; God gives water; he judges twenty years. Water. God answers his cry.
